title: Executive Assistant (Operations & Culture) - JL
description:
Location: Mapletree Business City
Contract Duration: 12 months

About the Role:
My client is seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Executive Assistant (Operations & Culture) to join their team on a 1-year contract. You will play a key role in streamlining operations, supporting internal initiatives, and fostering a culture of well-being to help teams thrive while achieving high-impact outcomes.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Streamline day-to-day operations and support process improvements to drive efficiency.

  • Track and report on key initiatives, ensuring transparency and performance monitoring.

  • Manage administrative and logistical tasks to support smooth project execution.

  • Assist in planning and organizing training programs for internal teams to enhance skills development.

  • Develop clear and engaging technical documentation and reports.

  • Coordinate internal and external community engagement initiatives to strengthen presence.

  • Manage ad hoc projects and special assignments to deliver high-quality outcomes.

  • Lead employee engagement initiatives, including recognition programs, feedback systems, and team-building activities.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or related field.

  • 3–7 years of experience in operations, strategy, or program management.

  • Strong understanding of business operations and process improvement methodologies.

  • Proven experience in implementing and optimizing processes to drive operational efficiency.

  • Excellent organizational, communication, and collaboration skills, with attention to detail in tracking, reporting, and documentation.

  • Proficiency in data analysis, trend identification, and operational improvements.

  • Experienced in event planning and execution, including logistics and engagement.

  • Skilled in productivity and project management tools (Microsoft Office, Google Workspace).

  • Familiarity with AI and automation technologies is a plus.

  • Preferably has prior experience working in an IT MNC company.

What We Offer:

  • A dynamic and supportive work environment.

  • Opportunities to contribute to meaningful projects and initiatives.

  • Exposure to cross-functional collaboration and strategic operations.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Justin Lee
Registration No: R22107715
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd
EA License: 14C7275

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
